title: Weather Change 天气变化
scene: 一家人在旅行途中遇到下雨，临时改变计划。

lines.en: Dad, look! It's starting to rain!
Oh no! We didn't bring any umbrellas!
Don't worry. Let's go into that gift shop and buy some.
lines.zh: 别担心。我们进那家礼品店买几把。

lines.en: Will it rain all day? What about our picnic plan?
lines.zh: 会下一整天吗？我们的野餐计划怎么办？

lines.en: Let me check the weather app on my phone.
lines.zh: 让我看看手机上的天气软件。

lines.en: It says the rain will stop in about an hour.
lines.zh: 上面说大约一小时后雨会停。

lines.en: Great! We can visit the indoor museum while we wait.
lines.zh: 太好了！我们可以趁等待的时间去参观室内博物馆。

lines.en: That sounds like a good plan! Is the museum far from here?
lines.zh: 听起来是个好计划！博物馆离这里远吗？

lines.en: No, it's just across the street. Let's run over there!
lines.zh: 不远，就在街对面。我们跑过去吧！

lines.en: Wait! Let me buy the umbrellas first. Here, Tom, take this one.
lines.zh: 等等！让我先买伞。给，汤姆，拿这把。
